title: koeleria longiglumis
intro: Koeleria longiglumis, also known as tall June-grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is believed to have potential health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Koeleria longiglumis include infusions, decoctions, and teas, which can be made by steeping the dried plant material in hot water. However, more research is needed to fully understand the effects and potential uses of Koeleria longiglumis, and it should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
